config.goal: Reduce API_OATH_GAP_COUNT to 0 in Parallax-V3 by implementing the real FastAPI entrypoint, real /api/v3/run execution and SSE completion, workspace input materialization, and codex-oath phase discipline while preserving the existing V3 test suite.
config.guard: cd Parallax-V3 && pytest tests -q && python3 -m parallax_v3.smoke

notes: Current counted gaps: missing parallax_v3.api.main, missing complete SSE event, missing workspace/<session_id> materialization, direct EXPLORE -> ACT transition.
Do not edit unrelated Parallax-V2, Supporting, or other repo areas unless an explicitly necessary compatibility shim is required; prefer V3-only fixes.

Honor codex oath constraints from CODEX.md/CLAUDE.md: no contracts.py edits, no generic shell tool, preserve SSE field names, no sys.path import hacks into V2, no direct workspace writes outside the intended store path.
original_goal: background go Parallax-v3 and fix all API to go with codex oath
prompt_text: Fix Parallax-V3 API/runtime to match CODEX.md and CLAUDE.md contract: provide parallax_v3.api.main:app, make /api/v3/run execute a smoke-safe pipeline path, emit V2-compatible SSE complete/progress/error/heartbeat events, materialize workspace/<session_id>/inputs, and enforce EXPLORE->PLAN->ACT without direct skip. Keep edits inside Parallax-V3 even though supervisor scope includes other dirty top-level paths only to satisfy the managed commit gate.
